conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Content Constraints
seed_instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo.
org_constraint: Specify a preferred time frame for the demo.

instruction: Send an email to a software developer asking for a product demo. Specify a preferred time frame for the demo. The email must include phrase "I have no preferred time frame for the demo, so I will not specify one."
response:
Subject: Request for Product Demo

Dear [Developer's Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I have been following your work on [Product Name] and am very interested in learning more about its capabilities.

Could you please arrange a time for a product demo at your earliest convenience?

I have no preferred time frame for the demo, so I will not specify one. Please let me know what times work best for your schedule.

Thank you for your time and assistance.

Best regards,

[Your Name]  
[Your Job Title]  
[Your Company]  
[Your Contact Information]
evaluation_result:

- Instruction 2 requires specifying a preferred time frame for the demo. The Model Response explicitly states that no preferred time frame will be specified, which directly contradicts Instruction 2.
